_comment: STEP 1 — App launches. Dwell on the home screen (unauthenticated).
STEP 2 — Sign in. Tap the Test Lab bypass button.
Wait for home screen to fully load after sign-in.
Dwell on home screen — shows today's brief + Ask MyNaavi bar.
STEPS 5-9 — Open 3-dot menu to reach Settings.
Settings loaded. Dwell — Robo auto-scrolls through the page.
STEP 10 — Press back to return to home screen.
Dwell on home screen — shows the full interface.
STEP 11 — Tap the text input and type the first command.
replacementText: Hi MyNaavi, what's on my calendar today?

_comment: Dwell on the typed command before Robo continues exploring.
